title: Persistence
content:
My hopes retire; my wishes as before
Struggle to find their resting-place in vain:
The ebbing sea thus beats against the shore;
The shore repels it; it returns again.
meaning: About: Walter Savage Landor (January 30, 1775 � September 17, 1864) was an English writer and poet, eldest son of Walter Landor and his wife Elizabeth Savage.
